# Tech Stack

<!-- Generated by /ai-context. Manual edits are overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### Runtime and language

| Component | Value |
|-----------|-------|
- **Language**: C# 12, nullable enabled, implicit usings
- **Framework**: WPF (.NET 8.0-windows)
| **Runtime** | .NET 8.0 LTS, Windows-only (`net8.0-windows` target framework) |
| **Output type** | `WinExe` (no console window) |
| **Package manager** | NuGet |
| **Version** | 1.0.0 |
| **Assembly** | `CertGuardMini` |

### Dependencies

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `Titanium.Web.Proxy` | 3.2.0 | HTTPS MITM proxy — intercepts traffic, injects client certificates, generates block pages, registers as system proxy |

No other NuGet packages. No dev dependencies. No test framework.

### Tests

| Component | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Test runner** | None — no test project in solution |
| **Assertion lib** | None |
| **Mock lib** | None |
| **Coverage tool** | None |

### Build and CI

| Step | Command / Config |
|------|-----------------|
| **Restore** | `dotnet restore` |
| **Build** | `dotnet build -c Release --no-restore` |
| **Publish** | `dotnet publish -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true` |
| **CI** | GitHub Actions, `workflow_dispatch` trigger, `windows-latest` runner, .NET 8.0 SDK |
| **CI artifact** | `CertGuardMini.exe` uploaded as `CertGuardMini-win-x64`, retained 30 days |
